settings.definition: The waiting area where valid unconfirmed Bitcoin transactions are held by nodes before they are included in blocks.
An unspent transaction output is a discrete piece of bitcoin value that can be used as an input in a later transaction.
A measure of the total computational work miners are directing toward Bitcoin proof of work.
A transaction has a confirmation when it is included in a block, with later blocks adding more settlement depth.
Holding your own private keys so you control spending without relying on a third-party custodian.
Software that independently checks Bitcoin rules and shares valid transaction and block data with peers.
